landing.heroTitle: The Future of Invoice Processing Is Here
landing.heroSubtitle: Transform your accounts payable with AI that reads, validates, and routes invoices automatically — reducing manual work by 80%.

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need to automate invoice processing
features.sectionSubtitle: Four powerful capabilities, one intelligent platform.
features.aiAutomationDesc: Drop a PDF, snap a photo, or forward an email — our AI reads every line, extracts every field, and enters the data for you. Zero manual entry. Zero errors.
features.analyticsDesc: Ask questions in plain English. 'What did we spend on logistics last quarter?' Our AI analyzes your invoice data and delivers instant, actionable insights.
features.approvalDesc: Multi-level approvals that route themselves. Set rules once — by amount, department, or vendor — and let the system handle the rest. Real-time status tracking included.
features.integrationDesc: Connect to your ERP, accounting software, or any system via REST API. Import and export invoice data in any format. Your existing tools, supercharged.

impact.title: Why Teams Switch to AI Invoice
impact.subtitle: Automate the entire invoice lifecycle — from receipt to payment — and see results from day one.
impact.item1Desc: AI OCR extracts every field from PDFs and images. Your team focuses on exceptions, not typing.
impact.item2Title: Catch Errors Before They Cost You
impact.item2Desc: Smart validation detects duplicates, PO mismatches, and price variances automatically.
impact.item3Title: Cut Approval Time from Days to Minutes
impact.item3Desc: Multi-level approvals route themselves. No more email chains or lost invoices.
impact.item4Desc: Live dashboard shows every invoice's status. AI Chat answers your financial questions instantly.
impact.item5Desc: Process 10x more invoices with the same team. Multi-company support included.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about AI Invoice Automation.
faq.ctaSubtitle: Start your free trial and experience it yourself, or contact our team for a personalized demo.
faq.q1: What file formats does the AI OCR support?
faq.a1: We support PDF, JPG, and PNG files. You can upload directly, forward email attachments, or send via API. Our AI extracts invoice data with 99.2% accuracy — no manual entry needed.
faq.q2: How does the AI Chat feature work?
faq.a2: Simply ask questions in plain English like 'What did we spend on logistics last quarter?' The AI analyzes your invoice data and responds with charts, summaries, and actionable insights. No SQL or technical knowledge required.
faq.a3: Yes! Start with a 14-day free trial — no credit card required. You get full access to all features so you can evaluate the platform before choosing a plan.
faq.q4: Can I change my plan later?
faq.a4: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and billing is prorated automatically.
faq.a5: We use AES encryption for sensitive data, JWT-based authentication, and role-based access control (RBAC) with 5 permission levels. All data is completely isolated between companies in our multi-tenant architecture.
faq.a6: Yes. You can manage multiple companies from a single account. Each company has completely separate data, users, and permissions — ensuring full data isolation.
faq.q7: How long does it take to get started?
faq.a7: You can start processing invoices within 5 minutes of signing up. Just create your account, configure your vendors and validation rules, and you're ready to go.
faq.q8: Can I integrate with my existing systems?
faq.a8: Yes. We provide a full REST API for integration with any ERP or accounting system. Gmail and Outlook email integration is built-in for automatic invoice collection.

guide.heroTitle: See How AI Transforms Your Invoice Workflow
guide.heroSubtitle: From a pile of PDFs to a fully automated pipeline — in under 5 minutes.
guide.beforeAfterTitle: The Old Way vs. The AI Way
guide.beforeAfterSubtitle: See what changes when AI handles your invoices.
guide.ba1Before: Manually type invoice data from PDFs
guide.ba4After: Instant spend analysis via AI Chat
guide.ba5Before: No idea which invoices are overdue
guide.stepsSubtitle: Five steps from paper to payment.
guide.step1Desc: Drop a PDF, snap a photo, or just forward the email. Supports PDF, JPG, PNG (up to 20MB). Or connect Gmail/Outlook for automatic collection.
guide.step1Quote: No more manual data entry — ever.
guide.step2Desc: Our AI scans the document and extracts invoice numbers, dates, amounts, vendor info, line items, and PO numbers — all automatically matched.
guide.step2Quote: 99.2% accuracy — review in seconds, not hours.
guide.step3Desc: The system automatically checks for duplicates, matches PO budgets, flags price variances, and warns about missing fields.
guide.step3Quote: Catch errors before they become costly mistakes.
guide.step4Desc: Invoices route automatically to the right approver. Set rules by amount, vendor, or department. Multi-level chains with real-time tracking.
guide.step4Quote: From days of email chains to minutes.
guide.step5Desc: Schedule payments via ACH, Wire, Check, or Credit Card. Track status in real-time. Ask AI anything about your spend data.
guide.step5Quote: Your AI financial analyst, always on call.
guide.dashboardSubtitle: Everything you need at a glance.
guide.dashKpi: KPI Cards — This month's invoices, unpaid, overdue, paid
guide.dashPipeline: Processing Pipeline — Every invoice's stage from received to paid
guide.dashTrends: Spend Trends — 12-month spending with month-over-month comparison
guide.dashActions: Action Required — Overdue payments, pending approvals, validation failures
